[SQL: SELECT DATE_TRUNC('month', createddate) AS month, COUNT(*) AS case_count
FROM "Case"
WHERE REPLACE(orderitemid__c, '#', '') IN (
  SELECT REPLACE(Id, '#', '') FROM OpportunityLineItem WHERE REPLACE(Product2Id, '#', '') = '01tWt000006hVJdIAM'
)
AND createddate >= DATE '2020-06-10'
AND createddate < DATE '2021-04-11'
GROUP BY DATE_TRUNC('month', createddate)
ORDER BY month;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"
